applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: Wits Chancellor's Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: 90%+ matric average; APS 44+; South African citizens

additionalFunding.name: Wits Academic Merit Award
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 40+ and subject-specific requirements per faculty

additionalFunding.name: Wits Sports Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: National / provincial representation; maintained academic pass rate

additionalFunding.name: Wits Equity Advancement Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Historically disadvantaged South Africans; household income < R350,000
